headline: 2 Reasons to Like CL (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Colgate-Palmolive trades at $92.24 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 11.2% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 8.4%.

headline: UAE oil output jumped 80% in June after leaving OPEC
summary: Investing.com -- The United Arab Emirates reported to OPEC that its oil production increased by 80% in June after leaving the producer group, according to a monthly report seen by Bloomberg on Monday.

headline: Oil rally, chip selloff, earnings loom  - What’s moving markets
summary: Investing.com - Renewed fighting between the United States and Iran rattled markets at the start of the week, sending oil prices sharply higher and weighing on stock futures.
